result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (BinderException): Binder Error: Cannot compare values of type VARCHAR and type DATE - an explicit cast is required

LINE 7: WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
                                  ^"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId,
       SUM(qli.Quantity * qli.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON REPLACE(c.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')
JOIN Quote q ON REPLACE(o.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REPLACE(q.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'#','')
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId,
       SUM(qli.Quantity * qli.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON REPLACE(c.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')
JOIN Quote q ON REPLACE(o.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REPLACE(q.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'#','')
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId,
       SUM(CAST(qli.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(qli.UnitPrice AS DOUBLE)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON REPLACE(c.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')
JOIN Quote q ON REPLACE(o.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REPLACE(q.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'#','')
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;
